content:
MODULE: cosmos.ide.terminal
FILE: cosmos/ide/terminal.py (117 lines)
CATEGORY: ide

DESCRIPTION: Terminal Session for IDE.

Provides PTY-based terminal for Windows and Unix.

CLASSES:
- TerminalSession: Terminal session for xterm.js integration.

Uses:
- pywinpty on Windows
- pty on
  Methods: async def start(self)
  Methods: async def read(self) -> bytes
  Methods: def write(self, data: bytes)
  Methods: async def stop(self)
